search.input_placeholder: Enter the value you want to search for...
search.missing_key_toast: Please select a search type before entering a value.

acceptance_status.true: The system accepts students from here
acceptance_status.false: The system does not accept students from here

new_student.title: New Student
new_student.description: A new student is one who is enrolling in the university for the first time. Please select this option if you have not previously studied in any college or university program.

existing_student.title: Existing Student
existing_student.description: An existing student is one who has previously enrolled in the university and has been registered for more than one academic year or has moved to a higher academic year.

resident_in_egypt.title: Resident in Egypt
resident_in_egypt.description: A student resident in Egypt is one who has a permanent residence inside the Arab Republic of Egypt at the time of application, whether Egyptian or non-Egyptian.

resident_outside_egypt.title: Resident Outside Egypt
resident_outside_egypt.description: A student resident outside Egypt is one who does not have a residence inside Egypt at the time of application, or a non-Egyptian student residing abroad.

egyptian.title: Egyptian
egyptian.description: Select this option if you are an Egyptian citizen. This applies to students born with Egyptian nationality and affects some administrative and academic procedures related to Egyptian students.

expatriate.title: Expatriate
expatriate.description: Select this option if you are a non-Egyptian citizen. This applies to foreign students or those residing outside Egypt and affects certain requirements and procedures for expatriate students.

coming_soon.title: Coming Soon
coming_soon.subtitle: This page is currently under construction and will be launched soon with more features and content.
coming_soon.under_development: We are currently working on developing this page to ensure the best user experience.
coming_soon.content: New features and rich content will be added soon.
coming_soon.thanks: Thank you for your patience, the launch will be soon!
